_comment: Layer-1 auto-exit thresholds. EXIT-ONLY. Conservative defaults — auto-exit is a floor that prevents catastrophe, not an active trade manager. liqProximityPct/maxLossPctOfMargin require clearinghouse data (HL_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS); when absent they are auto-disabled and only maxLossUsd + health triggers run. cooldownMs prevents repeated fires per (session, coin); lockTtlMs bounds a stuck in-flight close.
